objective: Add smooth viewport scroll-to-reveal on panel open and smooth scroll-back on close without layout/collision changes.

role_justifications.worker: Implemented pure viewport scroll helper and canary coverage.
role_justifications.critic: Checked manual-scroll, reduced-motion, layout/collision, and drag-auto-scroll risks.
role_justifications.acceptance_gate: Defined final targeted and full e2e acceptance evidence.
role_justifications.planner: Identified panel-action-controls toggle hook and test scope.
role_justifications.conductor: Selected core MAW roster and enforced fast frontend gates.
role_justifications.a11y_auditor: Reviewed reduced-motion and user-scroll accessibility risks.
role_justifications.change_verifier: Verified diff scope and evidence against frontend change gates.

acceptance_criteria: open below fold scrolls panel into view
manual user scroll prevents automatic restore
already visible panel does not scroll
no collision/reflow symbols in scroll path
